name: Browser and computer session runtime polish
objective: Prove daemon-owned managed browser/computer session state, replay projection, screenshot quarantine, and observe/take-over/return control transitions through the headless runtime bridge.
operatorPromptEquivalent: Open a sandbox browser, hit a login-gated fixture, wait for user input, allow operator take-over, and preserve replayable managed session state.
proofCommands: cargo test -p ioi-node --features local-mode --bin ioi-runtime-bridge managed_browser_session -- --nocapture
remainingLiveProof: Launch real Agent Studio GUI and render the managed sandbox browser card from persisted daemon state.
Use GUI controls to observe, take over, and return control to the agent.
Exercise a waiting-for-user browser fixture and capture the Waiting for user state.
Reload/reconnect the GUI and prove the managed session card replays from daemon state.
